alerts.header: Stop 60386 Eastbound W 41 Ave @ East Blvd is temporarily closed beginning Monday May 4. Please use new stop 60548 near Maple St.

UPDATE: Stop 51987 Eastbound E 49 Ave @ Elliott St is temporarily closed from Tue May 12 through Tue May 26 due to construction. 430 bus will be picking up passengers at the next stop #51988 EB 49 Ave and Vivian St.
Stop 52047 Westbound W 49 Ave @ Larch St is temporarily closed until end of service on May 20 due to construction.
Stop 59758 Eastbound W 2nd Ave @ Columbia St is temporarily closed from Wed May 20 through Sat May 30 due to construction.
Stop 60732 Westbound 49 Ave @ Main St is closed beginning Monday May 18. Please use original stop 52030 on other side of Main St.

Stop 52015 Westbound E 49 Ave @ Elliott St is temporarily closed from Wed May 20 to Tue May 26 from 7:00 AM to 3:00 PM daily due to construction. 430 bus will be picking up passengers at the next stop 52016 WB 49 Ave and Nanaimo St.
Stop 59434 Westbound E 49 Ave @ Vivian St is temporarily closed from Wed May 20 to Tue May 26 from 7:00 AM to 3:00 PM daily, due to construction.
Effective May 20, 99 UBC B-Line detour at Broadway & Main Street has ended. Service is now back to regular route along Broadway.
